reason: Medicare Advantage is a primary vector for regulatory capture and fiscal bleed. MA plans operate under risk-bearing contracts with built-in arbitrage opportunities; titled 'improvement' acts historically contain coding/payment expansions, exemptions from quality thresholds, or redirect CMS enforcement priority. Without summary text, the title alone signals high-probability carve-out architecture.
vectors: regulatory_capture: MA plan exemptions or safe harbors
fiscal_bleed: Medicare trust fund payment expansions to insurers
market_access_exploit: coding/billing methodology changes favoring MA over traditional Medicare
entitlement_erosion: potential shift of risk or cost to beneficiaries
title: Medicare Advantage Improvement Act of 2026
